message:
feat(engine): add 294 enrichment integration tests across 5 more modules

Add enrichment integration test suites for:
- key_attestation (53 tests): nonce generation, attestation signing,
  verification, replay detection, store lifecycle, serde
- key_derivation (48 tests): domain separation, context canonical bytes,
  deterministic derivation, epoch cache, invalidation, serde
- lab_runtime (57 tests): virtual clock, task lifecycle, schedule
  transcript, deterministic replay, fault injection, serde
- lease_tracker (62 tests): lease grant/renew/release, TTL expiry,
  epoch scoping, escalation, audit events, serde
- metadata_substrate_governance (74 tests): locality dimensions,
  portability scoring, governance evaluation, violations, receipts

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
